questions.question: Implement the following operations for a singly linked list: insert at head, delete at head, insert at tail, and delete at tail. Explain the time complexity of each operation.
What is the difference between a self-referential singly linked list and a regular singly linked list? Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
Write a C++ function to detect a cycle in a singly linked list. Explain the approach you used and the time complexity of the algorithm.
